title: Supplier Risk Assessment Method
alt: Five-step process for risk-based supplier assessment

items.label: Define criteria first
items.desc: Agree criticality and likelihood factors before scoring anything.

items.label: Score consistently
items.desc: Apply a simple matrix to high, medium and low risk bands.

items.label: Map to oversight
items.desc: Translate each band into proportionate, defined controls.

items.label: Set review triggers
items.desc: Re-score on defects, changes, inspections or adverse trends.

items.label: Close the loop
items.desc: Feed performance data back via periodic re-assessment.
